title: Peer Exchange: Validation Questions
description: Use AI follow-up questions to improve the questions you will ask a real stakeholder.

questions.prompt: Share three validation questions you plan to ask, the stakeholder role you hope to ask, and what you need to learn from the conversation.
questions.placeholder: Include the stakeholder role, your three draft questions, and the assumption or uncertainty each question is meant to test.
questions.aiContext: This is Sprint 3 of Reframing Problems with AI. The participant is preparing questions for a real stakeholder conversation. Push for listening rather than pitching, evidence rather than approval, and questions that uncover needs, constraints, tensions, and assumptions. Challenge yes-or-no questions, leading questions, and questions that ask stakeholders to solve the participant's assignment.
questions.discussionPrompt: Use these questions to refine your validation plan. Your final response should include stronger stakeholder questions and explain what each one is meant to test.
questions.summaryPlaceholder: Rewrite your validation questions. Include the stakeholder role, what each question tests, and what would count as useful evidence.
